name: Particles
desc: Spawns particle effects at a position with offset, speed, and count.
notes: Particle names: barriar, blockcrack, blockdust, bubble, cloud, crit, damageindicator, depthSuspend, drippingLava, drippingWater, droplet, enchantmenttable, endRod, explode, fireworkSpark, flame, footstep, happyVillager, heart, hugeexplosion, iconcrack, instantSpell, largeSmoke, lava, magicCrit, mobAppearance, mobSpell, mobSpellAmbient, note, portal, reddust, slime, smokeSpelling, snowballpoof, snowshovel, spell, suspended, sweepAttack, take, totem, townaura, wake, witchMagic.

implementation.overview: S2APacketParticles spawns particle effects. Particle ESP modules track damage indicator particles to estimate damage dealt. Critical detection reads sweepAttack particles. No module in the examined client sources directly targets this packet — particle handling is purely visual via vanilla rendering.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S2APacketParticles)
modules.purpose: Server sends S2APacketParticles to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
